featuresPodo.title: We take care of your foot health
featuresPodo.subtitle: Personalized advanced podiatry treatments for all ages

specialists.title: Podiatry specialists
specialists.description: Advanced treatments for all types of foot conditions.

personalized.title: Personalized care
personalized.description: Each patient receives a tailored treatment.

no_waiting.title: No waiting times
no_waiting.description: Fast appointments with no long waiting lists.

podoHome.title: Wellbeing for your feet
podoHome.subtitle: Podiatry clinic in Palma de Mallorca
podoHome.description: Clinical Podiatry and Advanced Biomechanics Unit. Specialists in the diagnosis and comprehensive treatment of foot conditions. We help patients achieve functional recovery using specialised medical protocols and treatments.

general.title: General podiatry
general.desc: Diagnosis and treatment of foot conditions such as calluses, corns, fungal infections or nail disorders. We carry out a full assessment to identify the root cause and apply the most appropriate treatment using advanced technology and safe techniques.

nails.title: Ingrown toenails
nails.desc: Safe, fast and almost painless treatment of ingrown toenails. We eliminate the cause of the problem, reduce inflammation and provide follow-up care to prevent recurrence, improving patient comfort and foot health.

sports.title: Sports podiatry
sports.desc: Prevention, diagnosis and treatment of injuries related to physical activity. We analyse gait and biomechanics to prevent overload, improve performance and reduce injury risk in athletes.

insoles.title: Custom insoles
insoles.desc: We perform a full biomechanical gait analysis to design fully customised insoles. These help correct postural imbalances, relieve pain and improve load distribution across the foot.

pain.question: Does podiatry treatment hurt?
pain.answer: No, treatments are painless or cause minimal discomfort. We always adapt the technique to patient sensitivity.

appointment.question: Do I need an appointment?
appointment.answer: Yes, it is recommended to book an appointment to ensure personalized care and no waiting times.

duration.question: How long does a session last?
duration.answer: Sessions usually last 30 to 45 minutes depending on the type of treatment.

frequency.question: How often should I visit the podiatrist?
frequency.answer: It depends on the case, but generally every 4 to 8 weeks for maintenance treatments is recommended.

nails.question: Do you treat ingrown nails or infections?
nails.answer: Yes, we treat nail conditions such as ingrown toenails, fungal infections and thickened nails safely and professionally.

clinic.question: Do I need to bring anything to the appointment?
clinic.answer: No, it is not necessary. We only recommend bringing usual footwear if we need to assess it.

locationContact.title: Want to know more?
locationContact.subtitle1: Located in the heart of Palma de Mallorca
locationContact.address: Plaza del Olivar 3 - Europa Building 07001 - Palma de Mallorca - Balearic Islands
locationContact.subtitle2: Call us or book an appointment online

hero.title: General Podiatry
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive foot care
hero.description: In general podiatry, we take care of your foot health. Small discomforts we often ignore can be signs that professional attention is needed to prevent further complications.

exploracion.title: Examination and diagnosis
exploracion.description: Comprehensive assessment of skin and nails for early detection of pathologies.

infecciones.title: Skin infections
infecciones.description: Treatment of plantar warts and other skin conditions.

quiropodologia.title: Chiropody care
quiropodologia.description: Proper nail trimming and treatment of calluses and heel care.

ungueal.title: Nail pathology
ungueal.description: Ingrown nails, thickened nails or fungal infections.

piel.title: Skin hydration and care
piel.description: Treatment of dry skin, cracks or excessive sweating.

educacion.title: Health education
educacion.description: Foot care and proper footwear recommendations.

exploracion.title: Examination and Diagnosis
description: Detailed clinical assessment to prevent and detect pathologies at an early stage.
Evaluation of foot morphology and joint mobility.
Design of a personalized health plan.

infecciones.title: Skin Infections
description: Specialized treatment of skin conditions and foot infections.

quiropodologia.title: Chiropodology
description: Essential clinical care to relieve pain and improve walking comfort.

ungueal.title: Nail Pathology

Re-education of thickened or deformed nails.
Restoration of nail aesthetics and function.

piel.title: Skin Hydration and Health

Prevention of cracks and skin lesions.

educacion.title: Health Education

podologiaDeportivaSection.title: Our approach to the athlete
podologiaDeportivaSection.description: We analyze the foot both in static and dynamic conditions, studying gait mechanics and the interaction between the body and the ground to improve efficiency and protect your joints.

podologiaDeportiva.title: Sports Podiatry
podologiaDeportiva.subtitle: Optimize your performance from the ground up
podologiaDeportiva.description: In sports, the foot is the main impact absorber and the driving force of propulsion. A technical movement repeated thousands of times with poor alignment is the origin of most overuse injuries.

estudio-biomecanico.title: Biomechanical Analysis of Walking and Running
estudio-biomecanico.description: Computerized analysis using pressure systems and video to identify abnormalities in the gait cycle.

prevencion-lesiones.title: Injury Prevention
prevencion-lesiones.description: Early diagnosis of plantar fasciitis, tendinopathies, periostitis and muscle overload.

plantillas-3d.title: Custom 3D Insoles
plantillas-3d.description: Design and manufacturing of orthotic insoles with technical materials adapted to each sport discipline.

calzado-deportivo.title: Sports Footwear Advice
calzado-deportivo.description: Technical recommendation based on foot strike, weight, terrain and running technique.

perfil-genetico.title: Musculoskeletal Genetic Profile
perfil-genetico.description: Identification of genetic markers related to tendon resilience and injury predisposition.

estudio-biomecanico.title: Biomechanical Gait and Running Analysis
description: Advanced movement analysis to optimize performance and detect gait abnormalities.
Video recording for gait cycle assessment.
Identification of asymmetries and postural imbalances.
Evaluation of sports technique according to discipline.

prevencion-lesiones.title: Injury Prevention
description: Early identification of risk factors for safe sports practice.
Early diagnosis of plantar fasciitis and tendinopathies.
Assessment of muscle overload and periostitis.

plantillas-3d.title: Custom 3D Insoles
description: High-precision orthotic insole design and manufacturing.
Adaptation to sports footwear and terrain.

calzado-deportivo.title: Sports Footwear Advice
description: Shoe selection based on morphology and activity.
Analysis of shoe drop and structure.
Recommendations based on stability and force control.
Prevention of injuries caused by improper footwear.

perfil-genetico.title: Musculoskeletal Genetic Profile
description: Identification of genetic predisposition for sports performance.

podologiaInfantil.title: Sports Podiatry
podologiaInfantil.subtitle: Optimize your performance from the ground up
podologiaInfantil.description: A child’s foot is not a smaller version of an adult’s foot; it is an organ in full development. As a specialist with advanced training in biology, I understand that each stage of the life cycle has its own timing and needs. We respect the ontogeny of the foot, knowing that the transition from cartilaginous templates to a consolidated bone structure depends on a specific maturational timeline that must be monitored.

podologiaInfantilSection.title: Our approach to the athlete
podologiaInfantilSection.description: We analyze the foot both statically and in motion, studying gait dynamics and the interaction of the body with the ground to improve your efficiency and protect your joints.

maduracion-osea.title: Bone Maturation Evaluation
maduracion-osea.description: Monitoring the appearance and consolidation of ossification centers and growth plates.

analisis-marcha.title: Gait and Movement Analysis
analisis-marcha.description: Diagnosis of conditions such as flat feet, toe-walking, and rotational/torsional lower limb alterations (walking with feet inward).

genetica.title: Genetic Profile of Bone Maturation (Synlab)
genetica.description: Study of DNA markers (VDR, collagen) to optimize joint and bone health from within.

patologias-infantiles.title: Treatment of Developmental Disorders
patologias-infantiles.description: Specialized management of Sever’s disease, ingrown toenails in children, and warts (papillomas).

tratamiento-no-invasivo.title: Non-Invasive Treatment
tratamiento-no-invasivo.description: We prioritize stimulation exercises and, only if strictly necessary due to bone maturation, design insoles that guide but do not limit natural movement.

calzado-ergonomia.title: Footwear and Ergonomics Advice
calzado-ergonomia.description: Recommendations based on developmental stage and foot ontogeny to support functional and healthy development.

maduracion-osea.title: Bone Maturation Assessment
description: Comprehensive growth monitoring to ensure proper musculoskeletal development.
Tracking the appearance and consolidation of ossification centers.
Monitoring growth plates during childhood and adolescence.
Assessment of lower limb alignment at each developmental stage.
Early detection of bone development abnormalities.

analisis-marcha.title: Gait and Movement Analysis
description: Functional movement study to identify and correct walking pattern variations.
Diagnosis of flat feet or pediatric high arches.
Assessment of toe walking and rotational abnormalities.
Evaluation of tibial and femoral torsions.
Analysis of stability and balance during physical activity.

genetica.title: Genetic Profile of Bone Maturation
description: Study of genetic markers related to joint development.
Optimization of preventive guidelines based on the child’s profile.

patologias-infantiles.title: Developmental Disorders and Pathologies
description: Skin conditions adapted to pediatric skin.
Management of ingrown nails and warts.

tratamiento-no-invasivo.title: Non-Invasive Treatment
description: Promotion of proprioception and motor development.

calzado-ergonomia.title: Footwear and Ergonomics Advice
description: Footwear selection according to the child’s developmental stage.
Ergonomic assessment of daily and school activities.

quiropodiaTheme.title: Chiropody
quiropodiaTheme.subtitle: Foot health and maintenance
quiropodiaTheme.description: Chiropody is the foundation of podiatric care. It is not an aesthetic treatment, but a clinical intervention aimed at eliminating skin conditions, preventing infections, and enabling early detection of systemic pathologies that manifest in the skin and nails.

quiropodiaSection.title: Specialized treatments for foot health
quiropodiaSection.description: We apply precise clinical techniques in chiropody and podiatric dermatology to ensure the health and absolute comfort of your feet.

hiperqueratosis.title: Hyperkeratosis Treatment (Calluses)
hiperqueratosis.description: Painless removal of calluses and corns (helomas) using professional debridement techniques, restoring the skin’s natural elasticity.

onicoterapia.title: Onychotherapy (Nail Care)
onicoterapia.description: Therapeutic trimming and drilling of nails to prevent inflammatory processes and ensure guided, healthy growth.

onicogrifosis.title: Onychogryphosis Treatment
onicogrifosis.description: Specialized treatment of thickened or dystrophic nails to restore functionality and comfort.

onicocriptosis.title: Onychocryptosis (Ingrown Nail)
onicocriptosis.description: Conservative treatment to relieve pain and prevent infection. Local anesthesia is available if necessary to ensure a completely painless and comfortable procedure.

talones.title: Heel Debridement and Rehydration
talones.description: Specific treatment for cracked heels, restoring the skin’s lipid barrier to prevent entry points for infections.

microbiologia.title: Microbiological Diagnosis (Fungi and Bacteria)
microbiologia.description: Sampling and cultures in collaboration with specialized laboratories to ensure evidence-based precision treatment.

hiperqueratosis.title: Hyperkeratosis Treatment (Calluses)
description: Professional debridement of calluses and corns (helomas).
Painless techniques to eliminate pressure points.
Assessment of skin hydration and lipid levels.

onicoterapia.title: Onychotherapy (Nail Care)
description: Therapeutic treatment of the nail plate.
Clinical trimming and technical drilling of nails.

onicogrifosis.title: Onychogryphosis Treatment
description: Management of thickened or deformed nails.
Therapeutic reduction of the nail plate.
Control of dystrophies caused by trauma or age.

onicocriptosis.title: Onychocryptosis (Ingrown Nail)
description: Treatment of pain in the nail grooves.

talones.title: Heel Debridement and Rehydration
description: Restoration of the skin’s lipid barrier.

microbiologia.title: Microbiological Diagnosis (Fungi and Bacteria)
description: Cultures to identify fungi or bacteria.

nailsTheme.title: Nail Surgery
nailsTheme.subtitle: Nail Surgery
nailsTheme.description: When conservative treatments are not enough to resolve chronic nail pathologies, we resort to minimally invasive surgical techniques. We perform outpatient procedures under local anesthesia, designed for rapid recovery and permanent functional results.

nailsSection.title: Effectiveness and recovery:
nailsSection.description: Our goal is for the patient to return to their normal routine as quickly as possible. We use outpatient techniques that allow patients to leave the clinic walking, with minimal discomfort and guaranteed aesthetic results.

onicocriptosis-cirugia.title: Onychocryptosis Surgery (Ingrown Nail)
onicocriptosis-cirugia.description: Application of definitive techniques such as chemical matricectomy. This procedure selectively removes the nail matrix (the 'root') on the affected side to prevent regrowth, permanently resolving pain and recurrent infections.

onicodistrofia.title: Management of Onychodystrophy
onicodistrofia.description: Surgical treatment involving total or partial nail avulsion in cases of chronic inflammation or deformities that cause disabling pain and do not respond to conservative treatments.

protocolo-quirurgico.title: High-Safety Surgical Protocol
protocolo-quirurgico.description: Procedures performed under strict aseptic and sterile conditions. We include personalized postoperative follow-up and scheduled wound care until final discharge to ensure optimal healing.

onicocriptosis-cirugia.title: Onychocryptosis Surgery (Ingrown Nail)
description: Definitive techniques to eliminate pain and recurrent infections.
Partial removal of the affected nail matrix.

onicodistrofia.title: Management of Onychodystrophy
description: Surgical treatment of deformed or chronic nails.

protocolo-quirurgico.title: High-Safety Surgical Protocol
description: Surgeries performed under strict clinical asepsis.

ortonixiaTheme.title: Orthonyxia
ortonixiaTheme.subtitle: Nail Re-education and Reconstruction
ortonixiaTheme.description: Orthonyxia is a non-invasive treatment that works like orthodontics for nails. It is the ideal alternative to correct excessively curved nails, prevent ingrown nails, and restore nail anatomy after a fracture or trauma.

ortonixiaSection.title: Nail correction using orthonyxia
ortonixiaSection.description: It is not always necessary to remove tissue; sometimes we only need to guide its growth. Orthonyxia respects the integrity of the nail, applying controlled physical forces to restore its functional anatomy and prevent it from becoming ingrown again.

brackets-ortonixia.title: Composite and Titanium Brackets
brackets-ortonixia.description: We use marbled composite (a high-resistance material used in dentistry) to create guides and apply titanium tensioners. These devices exert controlled traction that widens the nail from its base, forcing it to grow in a flat and functional shape.

reconstruccion-ungueal.title: Nail Plate Reconstruction
reconstruccion-ungueal.description: In cases of broken or missing nails, we reconstruct the structure to protect the nail bed and prevent soft tissue from filling the space, ensuring the new nail has a clear path to grow.

tamponado.title: Packing and Lateral Guides
tamponado.description: We apply cotton-gauze guides in the nail channels to mechanically prevent the nail edge from embedding into the skin during treatment.

prevencion-recidivas.title: Recurrence Prevention (Kinesiotaping)
prevencion-recidivas.description: We teach you how to perform specific neuromuscular taping techniques so that, depending on your case, you can reposition the fingertip soft tissue and prevent it from interfering with nail growth.

brackets-ortonixia.title: Composite and Titanium Brackets
description: Orthonyxia systems to correct nail curvature.
Controlled mechanical traction to guide growth.
Progressive widening of the nail plate.

reconstruccion-ungueal.title: Nail Plate Reconstruction
description: Aesthetic and functional restoration of damaged nails.
Recovery of the natural protective barrier.

tamponado.title: Packing and Lateral Guides
description: Mechanical separation between nail and soft tissue.
Placement of gauze in nail channels.
Immediate reduction of pressure and irritation.

biomecanicoTheme.title: Comprehensive Anthropometry
biomecanicoTheme.subtitle: Integrated assessment of load and posture.
biomecanicoTheme.description: In our clinic, the study of proportions covers the entirety of your structure. We perform a complete anthropometric profile to understand the overall architecture of your body. As a biological structure, the foot functions as the final receiver of all loads, levers, and imbalances occurring in the upper segments.

biomecanicoThemeSection.title: Comprehensive biomechanical assessment
biomecanicoThemeSection.description: Our goal is to optimize movement efficiency and improve gait mechanics, using technology to interpret your biology and ensure long-term joint health. To achieve this, we collaborate with Biomexanik, experts in cutting-edge biomechanical engineering.

exploracion-camilla.title: Examination on Treatment Table
exploracion-camilla.description: Assessment of joint range of motion and muscle balance to detect blockages or compensations in the foot and lower limbs.

huella-plantar.title: Plantar Footprint and Pressure Analysis
huella-plantar.description: Static analysis using a pressure platform to study foot morphology and load distribution.

analisis-marcha-dinamico.title: Gait Analysis
analisis-marcha-dinamico.description: Observation of the gait cycle to identify alterations in contact, stance, and propulsion phases.

calzado-ergonomia.title: Footwear and Ergonomics Assessment
calzado-ergonomia.description: Analysis of footwear wear patterns to understand their relationship with patient biomechanics.

diagnostico-mecanico.title: Mechanical Pathology Diagnosis
diagnostico-mecanico.description: Identification of the origin of plantar fasciitis, tendinopathies, metatarsalgia, and recurrent muscular overloads.

analisis-3d.title: 3D Gait Analysis
analisis-3d.description: Digitization of motor patterns through 3D capture to analyze the kinetic chain with biomechanical precision.

exploracion-camilla.title: Examination on Treatment Table
description: Assessment of joint range of motion and muscle balance.
Detection of blockages and compensations in the foot and lower limbs.

huella-plantar.title: Plantar Footprint and Pressure Analysis
description: Static analysis using a pressure platform.
Load distribution on the support base.

analisis-marcha-dinamico.title: Dynamic Gait Analysis
description: Study of phases: contact, stance, and propulsion.

calzado-ergonomia.title: Footwear and Ergonomics Assessment
description: Relationship between anatomy and support surface.
Evaluation of footwear impact on gait.

diagnostico-mecanico.title: Mechanical Pathology Diagnosis
description: Identification of the origin of plantar fasciitis and tendinopathies.
Detection of metatarsalgia and muscular overloads.
Study of the true origin of pain.

analisis-3d.title: 3D Motion Analysis with Technology
description: Digitalization of the full kinetic chain.
Biomechanical study supported by advanced technology.

plantillaTheme.title: Custom Insoles and Digital Orthoses
plantillaTheme.subtitle: Functional treatment of gait
plantillaTheme.description: After an exhaustive biomechanical analysis, we design fully customized solutions. Our goal is to translate study results into insoles and corrective devices that balance pressure distribution and optimize foot function, adapting both to daily activities and high-performance sports movement.

plantillaThemeSection.description: The combination of digital design and the use of advanced polymers such as TPU allows us to provide a dynamic foot support that respects the biology of movement, offering stability where needed and flexibility where the foot demands it.

impresion-3d.title: 3D Printing Manufacturing
impresion-3d.description: We use high-precision additive manufacturing processes. This technology allows us to selectively adjust rigidity and flexibility in different areas of the insole, achieving advanced biomechanical control.

tpu-alto-rendimiento.title: High-Performance TPU
tpu-alto-rendimiento.description: TPU (Thermoplastic Polyurethane) combines cushioning, elastic memory, and durability. It is the ideal base for treatments that require precision and long-lasting comfort.

diseno-digital.title: Digital Structural Design
diseno-digital.description: We apply advanced digital design to optimize internal structures, reducing weight without compromising strength and improving adaptation to footwear.

densidades.title: Density Versatility
densidades.description: We use different materials (EVAs and resins) to adjust pressure relief according to the pathology and required level of support.

acabados-biocompatibles.title: Biocompatible Technical Finishes
acabados-biocompatibles.description: We use breathable linings with antibacterial treatments that improve hygiene, thermal comfort, and skin health of the foot.

ortesis-digitales.title: Digital Orthoses and Corrective Taping
ortesis-digitales.description: We manufacture custom silicone orthoses and apply corrective taping to align toes, reduce pressure, and improve biomechanical function.

impresion-3d.title: 3D Printing Manufacturing
description: Full biomechanical control through additive manufacturing.
Design based on prior digital scanning.
Exact replica of the digital model.

diseno-digital.title: Digital Structural Design
description: Adaptation to any type of footwear.

densidades.title: Density Versatility
description: Use of EVA and technical resins.
Customization based on weight and activity.

antrometriaTheme.title: Comprehensive Anthropometry
antrometriaTheme.subtitle: Complete assessment of body composition and balance
antrometriaTheme.description: In our clinic, the study of proportions encompasses your entire structure. We perform a complete anthropometric profile to understand the overall architecture of your body. As a biological structure, the foot functions as the final receiver of all loads, levers, and imbalances occurring in the upper body segments.

antrometriaThemeSection.eyebrow: Why is this level of detail necessary?
antrometriaThemeSection.description: Many foot pathologies originate in the knee, hip, or even the spine. By performing a complete anthropometric profile, we not only treat the symptom in the foot, but also identify the cause within the overall structure of your body.

oseo.title: Bone Diameters
oseo.description: We measure the width of bony structures such as the wrist, femur, or ankle. We determine skeletal robustness and evaluate the load-bearing capacity of the body system.

pliegues.title: Skinfold Measurements
pliegues.description: We assess adipose tissue at strategic points. We understand fat mass distribution and analyze its metabolic and mechanical impact.

perimetro.title: Body Circumferences
perimetro.description: We analyze muscular contours in the limbs and trunk. We detect functional imbalances during gait.

somatotipo.title: Body Circumferences
somatotipo.description: We analyze muscular contours in the limbs and trunk. We detect functional imbalances during gait.

fotometriaTheme.title: Postural Photogrammetry
fotometriaTheme.subtitle: Digital postural analysis in the three spatial planes
fotometriaTheme.description: Photogrammetry allows us to perform a quantitative analysis of your posture through the capture and processing of high-resolution images. Through this system, we objectively identify asymmetries and misalignments in your skeletal structure across the frontal, sagittal, and posterior planes.

fotometriaThemeSection.eyebrow: Technology at the service of diagnosis
fotometriaThemeSection.description: Many foot pathologies originate in the knee, hip, or even the spine. By performing a complete anthropometric profile, we not only treat the symptom in the foot, but also identify the cause within the overall structure of your body.

desequilibrios.title: Identification of imbalances
desequilibrios.description: This information, combined with your anthropometric profile, gives us the key to understanding why your body moves the way it does and how we can optimize its efficiency. We make your posture visible so that, together with your physiotherapist or osteopath, we can re-educate your movement and align your foundation with your spine.

rotaciones.title: Analysis of angulations and rotations
rotaciones.description: We precisely measure degrees of inclination in the shoulders, pelvis, and knees. Small angular variations can generate overloads in the muscular and joint chain.

sagitales.title: Evaluation of sagittal curves
sagitales.description: We evaluate spinal curves (lordosis and kyphosis). We analyze their relationship with the center of gravity and detect displacements that affect overall balance.

seguimiento.title: Clinical evidence and monitoring
seguimiento.description: We generate a visual representation of the patient’s initial condition and allow comparison of progress after treatment or physical therapy.

dismorfiaTheme.title: Dysmorphias and Asymmetries
dismorfiaTheme.subtitle: The Imprint of Your History on the Body
dismorfiaTheme.description: We understand physical structure as the living record of your biography. Variations in form (dysmorphias) and differences in balance (asymmetries) are functional adaptations that the organism develops to manage its relationship with the environment and with its own experiences.

dismorfiaThemeSection.title: We analyze every asymmetry as a life adaptation
dismorfiaThemeSection.description: The biological capacity for adaptation in the face of extreme asymmetries forms the foundation of our methodology. We analyze real recovery processes to prioritize the person as a whole, avoiding isolated analysis of the injured segment.

ExpresiónCorporal.title: Body Expression Analysis
ExpresiónCorporal.description: We identify how asymmetries and chronic tensions are linked to patterns of fear, avoidance, and defense mechanisms. We interpret the body as a functional expression of biomechanical and emotional history.

Psicoterapéutica.title: Clinical and Psychotherapeutic Synergy
Psicoterapéutica.description: We collaborate with psychologists and psychoanalysts. We integrate psychological approaches with the interpretation of physical manifestations. We analyze dysmorphias and bodily asymmetries from a global perspective.

ReeducaciónyAutoconciencia.title: Re-education and Self-awareness
ReeducaciónyAutoconciencia.description: Biomechanical correction creates new opportunities for body awareness. It facilitates therapeutic processes with less physical resistance and improves the body’s functional integration.

CuerpoCambio.title: The Body as Support for Change
CuerpoCambio.description: Accepting the body structure as the foundation for change allows inhabiting the body in a more balanced way and promotes physical and emotional stability throughout the evolutionary process.

geneticaTheme.title: Genetics Applied to Health
geneticaTheme.subtitle: Your Code as a Roadmap
geneticaTheme.description: Genetics is the fundamental blueprint upon which your structure is built. We integrate molecular analysis to understand your body's predispositions and personalize your treatment from the deepest biological foundation.

geneticaThemeSection.eyebrow: Your genetics are not a fixed destiny
geneticaThemeSection.title: We interpret your biological code as a starting point
geneticaThemeSection.description: Your genetics do not define your limits, but rather your potential for adaptation. We use advanced molecular analysis to decode your biological profile and transform that information into a personalized strategy for prevention, balance, and long-term structural optimization.

patologia.title: Prevention of Structural Pathologies
patologia.description: We identify genetic markers associated with connective tissue, bone density, and inflammatory response. We anticipate chronic injuries and optimize the structural resistance of the foot and the biomechanical chain.

farmacogenetica.title: Pharmacogenetics and Evolutionary Nutrition
farmacogenetica.description: We analyze the interaction between genetics, nutrition, and metabolism. We optimize tissue regeneration and improve inflammatory response and overall biomechanical performance.

datosClinicos.title: Clinical Data Synergy
datosClinicos.description: We integrate genetic information with photogrammetry and biomechanical analysis. We generate a highly precise global diagnosis and relate biological inheritance to current functional status.

RendimientoyLongevidad.title: Performance and Functional Longevity
RendimientoyLongevidad.description: We adapt workload and recovery according to the genetic profile. We improve mobility, prevent overload injuries, and extend the functional health of the musculoskeletal system.

title: Research applied to the human musculoskeletal system
description: My line of work integrates clinical biomechanics, structural analysis, and psychosomatic interpretation models from an interdisciplinary approach. The goal is to understand the relationship between structure, function, and adaptation of the human body under different conditions of load, movement, and stress.

meta.unit: Musculoskeletal system in load and rest
meta.objective: Modeling structural adaptation and prevention of dysfunctions

1.title: 01 · Psychosomatic health and subject structure
1.text: Study of the somatic inscription of psychic processes from a structural psychoanalytic perspective. The body is interpreted as a system of manifestation of conflicts, defenses, and unconscious adaptations.

2.title: 02 · Sagittal alignment and postural control
2.text: Analysis of spinal variability in the sagittal plane and its relationship with dynamic balance, mechanical efficiency, and load distribution in standing position.

3.title: 03 · Biomechanical instability factors
3.text: Evaluation of anthropometric variables, body composition, and movement patterns that alter the center of gravity and generate structural compensations.

4.title: 04 · Musculoskeletal degeneration and adaptation
4.text: Longitudinal study of structural misalignments, joint mobility, and degenerative processes of the musculoskeletal system.
